sale_confirmed: Yɛakyerɛw. Wotɔn {item} {quantity} {unit}, {currency} {total_amount}. Wo mfaso: {currency} {profit}. Wo stock: {remaining_stock} {unit}.
sale_out_of_stock: Yɛakyerɛw. Nanso {item} asa! Kɔtɔ bi ntɛm.
inventory_single: {item}: {quantity} {unit} wɔ wo stock mu. Ne bo: {currency} {avg_cost} biara.
inventory_all_header: Wo nneɛma a ɛwɔ stock mu:
inventory_empty: Wonni nneɛma biara wɔ stock mu da.
daily_summary: Ɛnnɛ: Wotɔn {currency} {total_revenue}, Wotɔɔ {currency} {total_cost}, Wo sika a woadi {currency} {total_expenses}. Wo mfaso: {currency} {net_profit}. Transactions {transaction_count}. Adeɛ a wotɔn pii: {top_selling_item}.
daily_summary_comparison_down: Ɛnnora na ɛyɛɛ yie sen ɛnnɛ {profit_change_pct}%.
weekly_report: Nnawɔtwe yi: Wo mfaso nyinaa {currency} {total_profit}. Da biara {currency} {avg_daily_profit}. Da a ɛyɛɛ yie: {best_day}. Transactions {total_transactions}.
credit_profile: Nnada {period_days} a atwam mu: average daily revenue {currency} {avg_daily_revenue}, average daily profit {currency} {avg_daily_profit}, active days {active_days}, consistency score {consistency_score}. Risk level: {risk_level}.
clarify: Mante aseɛ yie. Mepa wo kyɛw, ka bio.
photo_unclear: Mihu transaction no mu yie wɔ mfonini no mu. Mepa wo kyɛw, fa mfonini foforo.
error: Biribi antɔ mu yie. Mepa wo kyɛw, bɔ mmɔden bio.
welcome: Akwaaba Susu Books! Mia button tuntum no na ka wo aguadeɛ ho asɛm kyerɛ me.
